items.title: Q3 earnings mixed as consumer sectors shine, labour codes weigh on margins
items.description: Indian companies saw mixed results in the December quarter. Consumer sectors like automobiles, banking, cement, and pharma performed well due to festive demand and GST cuts. However, labor code changes impacted profitability. Future trends will depend on rural demand, US trade measures, and raw material prices. Companies are focusing on new launches and efficiency to drive growth.

items.title: HUL Q3 Results: Cons PAT drops 30% YoY to Rs 2,118 crore; revenue rises 6%
items.description: HUL Q3 Results: The company’s revenue from continuing operations stood at Rs 16,441 crore, up 5.6% YoY from Rs 15,556 crore in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year, HUL said in a regulatory filing.​

items.title: HAL Q3 Results: Profit climbs 30% YoY to Rs 1,867 crore; co declares Rs 35/share dividend
items.description: HAL Q3 Results: Revenue from operations in the December quarter increased 11% YoY to Rs 7,699 crore, compared with Rs 6,957 crore in the same quarter last year.
